reel.deleteVideoBody: This video will be removed from your public portfolio. This can't be undone.
reel.deleteCascadeLine: If you delete this, all videos posted for this fish will also be deleted. If you want to keep them, choose "Stop" instead.

post.title: Post Fish Listing
post.editNotice: Edits apply to new orders going forward. Current and completed orders will continue to show the original information.
post.bankRequiredDesc: To post a listing, you need to register an account name and payout QR (link or image). You can start posting after registration.
post.caaCheck1: Based on region and fish type
post.caaDefault: Select a fish type to display
post.caaNote: ※ Based on CAA Farm Gate Price
post.caaHint:
For example, you can set a price 500–1,000 KHR/kg higher
than Farm Gate Price
as a guideline
post.caaNoData: No CAA reference price available for this fish type. Please enter your selling price.
post.caaNotAvailable: CAA reference price data not available
post.sectionPrice: Selling Price (use CAA reference as a guideline)
post.deliveryRateExample: Example: With 5,000 KHR per 10 km, 5 km = 2,500 KHR, 15 km = 7,500 KHR
post.deliveryNote1: ※ Free within the free delivery distance
post.deliveryNote2: ※ Beyond the free distance, auto-calculated based on the set fee and the actual distance
post.descriptionHintIntro: More detail builds restaurant trust. Consider including:
post.descriptionHintAppeal: Recommended points / what makes it special
post.descriptionPlaceholder:
Example:
- No medicines used. We feed home-made feed.
- We carefully manage pond water quality.
- Caught fresh in the morning.
post.errorSubmit: Failed to post. Please try again.
post.priceFormula: Sale price = Fish unit price + Gutting fee
post.gutPriceHelper: Price includes gutting. Restaurants can remove it at order time if not needed (−{{gut}} KHR/kg). Choose “Not offered” to sell whole fish only (buyers cannot choose gutting).
post.deliveryCommonTag: Paid by restaurant · shared by all listings
post.deliverableRadiusNote: You deliver up to here. Restaurants farther than this won't see your listings.
post.freeDeliveryNote: Delivery is free within this distance. We recommend offering free delivery for nearby areas (e.g. 5km). Leave blank to charge shipping on all deliveries.
post.deliveryFirstHelper: This delivery setting is saved for all your listings. No need to enter it again next time.
post.deliverySummaryHelper: Delivery applies to all listings. "Change" updates them all.
post.deliverySheetWarn: Delivery applies to all listings. Changing it updates all {{count}} current listings.
post.errorDelivery: Please enter delivery range and fee.
post.errorDeliveryFee: Please enter the delivery fee (per 10 km)
post.descriptionWarn: Please write only the facts (false claims undermine trust).
post.successSub: It will appear in your listings.
post.gutHelperNone: Sold as whole fish only (no gutting). Buyers cannot choose gutting.
post.error100Unit: Please enter in units of 100 riel.
post.priceFormulaNoGut: Sale price = Fish unit price (no gutting)

onboarding.doneSub: Just set up 3 things before you start
onboarding.homeDesc: Use it like an app and receive notifications (required on iPhone)
onboarding.notifyDesc: Get updates about orders, chat, and delivery
onboarding.notifyDeniedHint: Notifications are blocked. Please enable them in your device/browser settings.
onboarding.soundDesc: Hear new orders and updates with sound
onboarding.payoutDesc: To receive payment for your fish, register your payout info (ABA account) before listing.

recover.phoneSub: We'll send a code to your registered phone number
recover.phoneHint: We'll send a verification code by SMS to this number
recover.fallbackBody: Sending codes by SMS is not available yet. Please contact the admin to reset your password after your phone number is verified.
recover.setPwNote: You'll be logged in automatically after setting it
recover.resetFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.s1Body: FISHLINK connects fish farmers and restaurants for buying and selling fish. By using the service, you agree to these terms.
terms.s2Body: You are responsible for your account information and password. Your information must be true and accurate.
terms.s3Body: All payments must go through FISHLINK. Attempting to bypass the platform or settle off-platform is prohibited and may result in account restrictions.
terms.s4Body: Please use appropriate language. False reviews, impersonation, or harassment may be removed and may lead to account restrictions.
terms.s5Body: These terms may be revised. The latest version will be shown in the app.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: Display name, phone number, location, and transaction information needed for the service.
privacy.s2Body: To connect buyers and sellers, send notifications, and support payments/delivery.
privacy.s3Body: We share only the information necessary between transaction parties (e.g., location for delivery). We do not sell your information.
privacy.s4Body: Information is stored securely on Firebase. We strive to protect your data.
privacy.s5Body: For privacy questions, please contact the FISHLINK admin.

restaurant.title: Fish Market
restaurant.subtitle: Browse nearby fish farms
restaurant.campaignDesc: Order now and enjoy special pricing
restaurant.empty: No fish found for this filter

delivery.sendStatusHint: ※ Tap a quick status to send
delivery.confirmComplete:
Mark delivery as complete?
This will prompt the restaurant to confirm receipt.
delivery.confirmReceive:
Have you received the fish and want to confirm receipt?
You will proceed to the payment screen.
delivery.pendingBannerDesc: You'll be able to send messages once the farmer approves the order
delivery.confirmDelete: Retract this message? It will be shown with a strikethrough.
delivery.statusSendHint: Tapping notifies the restaurant. The order of steps can vary.
delivery.completeModalBody: The restaurant will be notified to pay (payment on receipt).
delivery.completeModalBodyPrepay: The restaurant will be notified of delivery completion. If there are no problems, the trade completes in a few hours and the payout is confirmed.

voice.errorPermission: Microphone access is required. Please allow microphone in your browser settings.

myCoupons.title: Available Coupons
myCoupons.empty: You don't have any usable coupons yet. Share your referral code to earn coupons when someone uses it.
myCoupons.sourceReferred: Earned because you were referred by {{name}}

bonus.farmerHasTickets: Your next {{count}} completed transactions will each add +{{amount}} KHR to your payout
bonus.farmerEmpty: No referral bonus credits available. Share your referral code to start earning bonuses.
bonus.farmerDescNote: * One credit is consumed automatically each time a transaction completes.

coupon.inputHelp: You can find your coupon codes on your account page.
coupon.invalidFormat: Coupon code must be 8 alphanumeric characters
coupon.notOwned: You cannot use someone else's coupon
coupon.alreadyUsed: This coupon has already been used
coupon.disableCampaign: * Campaign discount is disabled while a coupon is applied
coupon.walletTapHint: * Tap a coupon you own to apply it (no code entry needed)
coupon.walletCampaignNote: * Campaign discount isn't applied while a coupon is in use (the better deal applies automatically)

referral.cardDescRestaurant: When someone enters this code at sign-up and completes their first transaction, both of you receive rewards.
referral.cardDescFarmer: When someone enters this code at sign-up and completes their first transaction, both of you receive rewards.
referral.shareText:
Trade fresh farmed fish on FISHLINK. Sign up from the link below and the referral code fills in automatically (code: {{code}}).
https://fishlink-t-shitamichi.web.app/register.html?ref={{code}}
referral.phase1Note: * Rewards (coupons / farmer bonuses) will roll out progressively.
referral.codeInputHelp: Enter a referral code if a friend gave you one.
referral.errorFormat: Referral code must be 8 alphanumeric characters
referral.errorSelf: You cannot use your own referral code
referral.timingTwoStage: New users get their reward right after signing up; you get yours once they complete their first trade.
referral.bonusPending: Added automatically, one at a time, to your upcoming payouts (pending bonus).
referral.shareToEarnBonus:
Share your code to earn
a +{{amount}} KHR bonus
referral.couponMultiHint: * In the cart, one coupon per order is applied automatically, soonest-expiring first (no manual pick or stacking). This page is view-only.
referral.shareToEarnCoupon:
Share your code to earn
a {{amount}} KHR coupon
referral.amountDynamicHint: * Amounts and expiry may change per platform settings (current values shown).

order.title: Confirm Order
order.confirmSubmitTitle: Submit order with the following details?
order.confirmSubmitAsk: The producer will be notified upon confirmation.
order.autoCalcNote: Auto-calculated based on quantity, processing & delivery
order.moreFromFarmerDesc: This farmer has other fish available
order.deliveryNatureSub: Shipping is a flat fee per delivery (it doesn't change with quantity). The amount is shown in the cart.

orders.title: Confirm Order
orders.declinedNotice: The farmer declined due to being out of stock. You can reorder the same fish from another farmer.
orders.confirmApproveAsk: The restaurant will be notified once you approve.
orders.confirmDeclineAsk: The restaurant will be notified once you decline (this order will be routed to other farmers).
orders.declineDetailPlaceholder: e.g. Cannot harvest from pond today
orders.declineDetailHint: ※ Free text available when 'Other' is selected
orders.cancelModalBody: You can cancel only before the farmer approves. The farmer will be notified.
orders.cancelFailedApproved: This order was already approved by the farmer and can no longer be cancelled.
orders.arrivedNote: Please wait for the restaurant to receive it
orders.approveFailedCancelled: This order was cancelled by the buyer and can no longer be approved.
orders.cancelRefundModalBody: The {{amount}} KHR you paid will be refunded to your wallet (usable on your next order). You can cancel because the farmer hasn't approved yet.
orders.autoDeclinedNotice: The farmer didn't respond, so the order was auto-declined. You can reorder the same fish from another farmer.
orders.deliveredNote: Delivered. If there's no problem, the trade will auto-complete in a few hours
orders.payUnconfirmedNote: We couldn't confirm your payment. Please pay again or contact support.
orders.reportedConfirmingNote: You reported an issue. We are reviewing it.
orders.reviewWaitSubBuyer: Rate farmers you traded with (last 2 weeks)
orders.reviewWaitSubFarmer: Rate restaurants you traded with (last 2 weeks)
orders.reviewWaitListSubFarmer: Rate restaurants you traded with (last 2 weeks, optional)
orders.reviewWaitListSubBuyer: Rate farmers you traded with (last 2 weeks, optional)

payment.title: Payment
payment.deadlinePassed: Payment deadline has passed. Please pay as soon as possible.
payment.payAfterReceipt: Order received — please complete payment soon
payment.qrHint: ※ If you can't scan on this phone, tap "Open Link" to pay, or save the QR image
payment.confirmModalBody: FISHLINK will verify your payment. After confirmation, the status becomes "Awaiting payment confirmation".
payment.errorSubmit: Something went wrong. Please try again.
payment.remittanceDesc: The restaurant does not pay the farmer directly. Once payment is confirmed, FISHLINK transfers the amount to the farmer.
payment.reviewAfterConfirm: * Review appears after payment is confirmed
payment.statusProblemHoldDesc: An issue has been reported. FISHLINK is reviewing it. We will contact you about remittance or next steps after the review.
payment.remittanceHoldDesc: Once the issue is reviewed, the amount is remitted if there is no problem. Depending on the case, part or all may be refunded to the restaurant.
payment.statusWaitingPaymentDesc: Once the restaurant's payment is confirmed, FISHLINK will transfer the funds.
payment.statusPaidByRestaurantDesc: FISHLINK will process the remittance after verifying the payment.
payment.statusConfirmedDesc: FISHLINK is preparing to transfer the funds.
payment.statusRemittedDesc: Funds have been transferred to your account.
payment.paidFull: ✓ Paid from wallet balance (no KHQR needed)
payment.escrowNote: Your payment is held safely by FISHLINK until you receive your order. If the farmer declines or there is a problem with delivery, it is refunded to your wallet.
payment.escrowNoteMulti: Each farmer approves/declines separately. Declined farmers' amounts are refunded to your wallet (other farmers proceed as normal).
payment.khqrTag: This QR includes the amount ({{amount}} KHR)
payment.khqrHelp: Paying on the same device: 'Open in bank app' is fastest. If your bank doesn't open, use 'Save QR image' then scan from image in your bank app. FISHLINK receives and holds it safely until you receive your order (declines/delivery problems are refunded to your wallet).
payment.confirmPaidBody: Tapping 'I have paid' sends the order to the farmer. If you haven't paid yet, please pay with the QR first.
payment.statusDeliveredDesc: If there's no problem, the trade will complete in a few hours.
payment.statusHoldDesc: Support is reviewing the reported issue.
payment.reviewAfterTrade: * Reviews appear after the trade is completed
payment.payoutWaitingDesc: If there are no problems, the trade completes in a few hours and FISHLINK sends your payout.
payment.aboutRemittancePrepay: The payment is held by FISHLINK (not paid directly to the farmer). If there are no problems, FISHLINK sends the payout to the farmer after the trade completes.

cart.title: Cart
cart.addedModalSub: Continue shopping or go to your cart?
cart.singleOrderWarning:
You have other fish in your cart.
Pressing 'Place Order' here will only order this single fish — cart contents will not be included.

To order everything together, press 'Cancel' and go to the cart.

Press 'OK' to continue with the single-item order.
cart.alreadyInCartWarning:
This fish is already in your cart.
Proceeding will create a separate order, distinct from your cart.

To order together with cart items, press 'Cancel' and go to the cart.

Press 'OK' to continue with the single-item order.
cart.confirmRemove: Remove this item from the cart?
cart.confirmSubmitTitle: Submit the order with the following details?
cart.confirmSubmitAsk: Each producer will be notified upon confirmation.
cart.deliveryFeeNote: A flat fee per delivery. It doesn't change with quantity.
cart.suggestDesc: Another farmer in your cart also sells this fish. Merging items from one farmer can save on delivery fees. It is just a suggestion—you choose what to do.
cart.suggestLabel: You could switch the farmer for {{fish}} to save
cart.sameDelivery: No delivery savings expected, but merging is still possible
cart.confirmDesc: Your order will be placed as shown below. Tap "Confirm order" to finalize.
cart.errorDelivery: Please pick a delivery date & time
cart.gutWholeFishOnly: Whole fish only (gutting not available for this listing)

pushOptin.bodyFarmer: We'll notify you the moment a new order arrives, so you don't miss approvals.

Ban this user?

Grant the GAqP certification badge to this farmer?

faq.needContent: Enter a question and answer in at least one language to save

tx.title: Transactions
tx.subtitle: Track each order by status and handle payment / remittance / completion from the detail page

order.title: Order Management
order.subtitle: Manually process: restaurant payment → farmer remittance → completion
order.includesNote: Includes fish / delivery / service fee / discount
order.memoPlaceholder: e.g. Confirmed restaurant payment. Will remit to farmer this afternoon.
order.finalDesc: Once payment and remittance are done, mark the transaction complete
order.holdDesc: Remittance to the farmer is on hold for this order. Review it and decide: remit / refund / partial refund.
order.confirmReleaseHold: Release the remittance hold? (when judged to have no problem)
order.depositProofLabel: Deposit record / memo (deposit screenshot / shortfall / payer note)
order.depositMemoPlaceholder: e.g. Deposit OK. / Only 50,000 received, chasing 837 shortfall.

settings.title: Fee Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure service rate, commission rate, and campaigns
settings.bannerActiveHint: When ON, a 'Special Discount Campaign' banner is shown at the top of the Home screen (below the search bar).
settings.campaignActiveHint: When enabled, service fee is discounted
settings.campaignDiscountHint: Discount rate applied to the fish subtotal. Set it equal to the service rate to effectively waive the service fee.
settings.campaignEndDateHint: The banner shows until this date (enabling the campaign is the effective start). It hides automatically after this date.
settings.farmerCampaignActiveHint: When enabled, the service fee is discounted
settings.farmerCampaignDiscountHint: Discount rate applied to the fish subtotal. Set it equal to the commission rate to effectively waive the commission.
settings.farmerCampaignEndDateHint: The campaign shows until this date (enabling the campaign is the effective start). It hides automatically after this date.
settings.leadTimeHoursHint: Minimum time from order to delivery. Time slots starting sooner than this can't be selected (default 8 hours).
settings.reportWindowHoursHint: Buyers and farmers can report problems only within this many hours after delivery is completed. After that the entry disappears and payment proceeds to the farmer (default 4 hours).

referral.title: Referral Coupon Settings
referral.subtitle: Configure coupon amounts, farmer bonuses, and caps for referral-driven orders
referral.enabledHint: When OFF, applied codes are recorded but no discount or bonus is issued
referral.restaurantCouponHint: Coupon issued to both the referring and the referred restaurant. 0 disables issuance
referral.farmerBonusHint: Bonus added on top of the payout for both the referring and the referred farmer. 0 disables it
referral.validDaysHint: Days a coupon stays valid from issuance. Default 30
referral.maxReferralsHint: Cap on how many people one user can refer. 0 = unlimited
referral.statsPending: Aggregation will start once Phase 2 is implemented

caa.title: CAA Reference Prices
caa.subtitle: Register reference Farm Gate Prices by fish / province
caa.matrixHint: Edit the province × fish matrix in the same order as the official CAA sheet. Top row in each cell: price range (KHR/kg); bottom row: size. Update monthly and click Save.
caa.ocrHint: Extract text from a CAA price sheet image. Use the extracted text as a reference or auto-fill cells (accuracy depends on image quality).
caa.ocrTextPlaceholder: Text will appear here after running OCR
caa.ocrAutofillEmpty: No rows matching province names were found. Check image quality.
caa.ocrAutofillDone: Filled {{count}} cells. Please review and save.
caa.ocrAutofillMissing: The following provinces could not be auto-filled (please enter manually)
caa.clearConfirm: Clear all entered values ({{count}} cells)? This is local only — nothing is written to Firestore until you press Save.

reports.title: Trouble Reports
reports.subtitle: List of issues reported by restaurants and farmers and their status
reports.confirmHidePost: Hide this post? (It disappears from public view but is kept in the database as a record.)

legal.title: Terms & Privacy Policy
legal.subtitle: Edit the text and publish per language. Users see the published version only.
legal.hint: Prepare each language in its tab (draft with an external tool → human review → paste and publish here; the app does not translate). Publishing updates the published version for that language and reflects it in the app.
legal.needContent: Enter the Japanese title and body

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.nudge: Automatically used on your next order
wallet.nudgeSub: You can choose how much to use at checkout
wallet.emptyNote: Refunds from a farmer declining your order or a delivery problem are saved here and used automatically on your next order.
wallet.refundRequest: Request a refund of your balance
wallet.empty: No history yet. Refunds will appear here.
wallet.txWithdrawCp: Requested via support chat → sent to your refund account
wallet.destMissingBody: Please register an account or QR to receive the refund. You can request after registering.
wallet.sheetNote: Our team will review and manually transfer to the account above (1–3 business days). Your balance is deducted immediately when you request.
wallet.sheetSubmitSub: The request is sent to support chat
wallet.sheetSubmitDisabledNote: Register a refund account to submit a request

farmerOrder.paidBandSub: The restaurant has already paid. Your payout will be sent after delivery is complete.
farmerOrder.approveModalPaidNote: The restaurant has already paid. Approving will notify the restaurant.
farmerOrder.declineModalRefundNote: Declining will notify the restaurant and refund their payment.
